prestazioni: L539 6.5L V12 naturally aspirated engine: Full titanium internals upgrade with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft by JE Pistons for 1,200+ HP reliability at 9,500 RPM redline. Paired with a custom Novitec-engineered dry sump system featuring a Peterson 4505 oil pump and integrated Accusump reservoir for sustained lateral G-forces.

Dual Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers with TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegates and custom 4.0-inch titanium downpipes by Armytrix, mated to a Novitec-tuned Lamborghini L539-specific ECU reflash with Motec M150 piggyback for real-time boost control (1.5 bar peak) and individual cylinder fuel trimming via 12x Bosch Motorsport 2000cc injectors.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Quaife ATB differential with carbon fiber clutch pack, Novitec-sourced billet aluminum transmission internals (gears 1-4 reinforced), and a custom 3.5-inch carbon fiber driveshaft by Dymag. Suspension overhaul includes Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, Eibach ERS race springs (20% stiffer front, 15% stiffer rear), and Lamborghini OEM-spec carbon ceramic brakes with AP Racing 6-piston calipers and 420mm discs (upgraded from 400mm).
estetica: Full Novitec Torado widebody conversion kit with 3D-scanned carbon fiber fenders (2.5-inch wider front, 3-inch wider rear), custom vented hood with integrated NACA ducts for turbocharger heat extraction, and a rear diffuser by Prior Design featuring active aerodynamics with a Gurney flap adjustable via Lamborghini’s ALA 2.0 system.

Custom Forgiato 22x12 (front) and 22x13 (rear) forged monoblock wheels with titanium lug bolts, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (345/25R22 front, 355/25R22 rear). Wheel arches lined with carbon fiber fender flares by Rocket Bunny, featuring integrated LED turn signals and heat-extracting vents for the turbochargers.

Interior: Full Alcantara and carbon fiber retrim by Sabelt, including a custom roll cage with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360), Sparco QRT-K seats with 6-point harnesses, and a Motec C127 dash display replacing the OEM cluster. Exterior accents include a custom Novitec-designed front splitter with integrated canards and a rear wing by Liberty Walk (Type 3, 1,200mm width) with adjustable angle via hydraulic actuators.
